summary: Maeda has pivoted from a profitable bearish short position to declaring that the market bottom is in and Bitcoin is poised for higher prices.
narrative: Although he spent late 2025 successfully shorting Ethereum and advising capital preservation, his most recent video explicitly states that the crypto markets are bottoming. He now argues that BTC is ready to move higher, suggesting a clear end to his previous bearish thesis.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
